settings.question: How fast will I see results?
settings.answer:
Most guys notice better recovery within the first week, but the real transformation happens around week 3-4 when you can start training at volumes that used to destroy you.

Your supply crisis doesn't fix overnight, but once it does, the difference is obvious.

settings.question: How is this different from creatine or protein?
settings.answer:
Those are building blocks. This is your body's repair coordinator.

Creatine gives you energy, protein gives you materials, but BPC-157 tells your body how to use them efficiently.

It's why some guys get way more from the same supplements.

settings.question: Why capsules instead of injections?
settings.answer:
Injections hit one spot. Oral hits your entire system. Plus no needles, no injection sites, no hassle.

You can take this with your pre-workout and nobody knows you're running advanced recovery protocols.

settings.question: Can I stack this with my current supplements?
settings.answer:
BPC-157 actually makes your other supplements work better by optimizing gut absorption and reducing systemic inflammation.

Most guys keep their regular stack and add this as the missing piece.

settings.question: How long should I use this?
settings.answer:
As long as you're training seriously.

Your body's natural BPC-157 production doesn't improve with age, so if you want to maintain elite recovery capacity, you need to maintain adequate levels.
